heroText: Together, they begin a new chapter of forever.

letterContent.msg1: From the moment the two of you found each other, something beautiful shifted in this world. Your love story isn't just about two hearts meeting — it's about two souls recognizing each other across time. The way you laugh together, the way you hold on through storms, the way your eyes speak what words never could — that is the kind of love poets have tried to capture for centuries.
letterContent.p2: May your journey together be filled with mornings that start with warm smiles, evenings wrapped in comfort, and a lifetime of moments that remind you why you chose each other. May you always be each other's home — a safe place where dreams grow and love deepens with every passing day.
letterContent.p3: Marriage is not just a ceremony. It is a promise whispered between two hearts — to stay, to grow, to forgive, and to love even harder when the world gets heavy. You two carry that promise so beautifully.
letterContent.p4: With all the love in my heart, congratulations on your beautiful forever. 💛

wishes.title: Always Hand in Hand
wishes.text: May your path be easy and your burdens light. Walk together with grace, kindness, and unwavering trust.

wishes.title: A Home of Joy
wishes.text: May your home be filled with laughter that echoes through the walls and love that fills every corner.

wishes.title: Endless Love
wishes.text: May your love grow stronger with every sunrise and deeper with every moon. A bond that time only makes more beautiful.

timeline.event: First Encounter — Two paths crossed and nothing was ever the same.
The Proposal — A question that changed everything, answered with tears of joy.
The Big Day — Where forever begins, surrounded by love and blessings.
